name: Martial Arts-Inspired Strength, Mobility & Agility Circuit
description: A bodyweight circuit of three martial arts-inspired exercises targeting strength, mobility, and agility, performed for 3 sets with minimal rest.

activities.notes: Keep core engaged, maintain straight body line. 8-10 reps total.
Focus on smooth rotation and balance. 10 reps total, alternating sides.
Drive hips back in sprawl, land softly. Work for 30 seconds continuously.

tips: Perform exercises back-to-back with minimal rest
Focus on controlled movement quality over speed

media.caption: 3 Martial Arts-Inspired Exercises for Strength, Mobility & Agility
